context_summary: Successfully completed Batch 1 of Major Bug fixes. Secured Gemini WebSocket by using x-goog-api-key header and downgrading response logging to DEBUG. Hardened connection references and activeToolCalls map lifecycles. Implemented auto-reconnect and main-thread callback routing in DeepgramLiveClient. Eliminated 80% code duplication in GeminiTextService. Verified with a new 3-test suite in MajorBugsBatch1Test, passing all 50/50 unit tests successfully.
